info.title: Starvis API
info.description:
Star Citizen game data, RSI website data, accounts, corporations, chat and admin REST API.

Data sources:
- **P4K game data** (ships, components, items, commodities, shops, missions, mining, crafting, locations)
- **RSI Website** (ship matrix, galactapedia, comm-links, starmap, organizations)

### Authentication
The documented external `/api/v1` API is protected and requires a Bearer JWT generated from a user session or API token. The public web interface uses an internal server-side proxy and does not expose anonymous `/api/v1` access. Authenticated endpoints support:
- **Bearer JWT** (`Authorization: Bearer <token>`): obtained via `POST /auth/login` or `POST /auth/api-token`. Required for `/auth/me`, chat, corporation workspace and admin routes.
- **Auth cookie** (`starvis_token` by default): used by the Starvis web app and accepted by protected API and Swagger routes.
- **API Key** (`X-API-Key` header): accepted for trusted Starvis server-to-server calls only, including admin tools and the public IHM proxy. Do not expose it to browsers or third-party clients.

### Swagger access
- Anonymous users and standard `user` accounts cannot access Swagger.
- `developer` accounts can access `/api-docs` with all non-admin routes.
- `admin` accounts can access `/api-docs` with all routes, including admin routes.

### User Roles
| Role | Description |
|---|---|
| `user` | Standard account — access to public data and authenticated user features |
| `developer` | Developer account — can access API documentation and developer tools |
| `admin` | Full access including user management and admin API |

Roles are assigned by an admin via `PUT /admin/users/{id}/role`.

### Pagination
List endpoints generally support `page` and `limit` query parameters and return `{ data, total, page, limit, pages }`.

### Filters
Domain `/filters` endpoints return `{ filters: { fieldName: [{ value, label, count? }] } }` when available.

### Game environments
Use the `env` query parameter to select the game environment: `live` (default), `ptu`, `eptu`, `tech-preview`, `custom`.

sort.name: sort
sort.description: Field to sort by (supports dot-notation for JSON fields, e.g. `game_data.scm_speed`)

UserRole.description: User role. `developer` grants access to API documentation and developer tools. `admin` has full access including user management.

min_purchase_price.description: Lowest extracted in-game purchase price from linked ship shop inventories.

min_rental_price_1d.description: Lowest extracted 1-day rental price from linked ship shop inventories.

min_rental_price_3d.description: Lowest extracted 3-day rental price from linked ship shop inventories.

min_rental_price_7d.description: Lowest extracted 7-day rental price from linked ship shop inventories.

min_rental_price_30d.description: Lowest extracted 30-day rental price from linked ship shop inventories.

purchase_location_count.description: Number of extracted shop locations selling this ship.

rental_location_count.description: Number of extracted shop locations renting this ship.

game_data.description: Raw JSON game data from P4K

gallery.description: Official RSI ship gallery images scraped from the ship pledge page.

Component.description: Ship component from DataForge (weapon, shield, QD, thruster, utility, etc.). All stat fields are nullable — only the fields relevant to the component type are populated.

type.description: Component type: WeaponGun | Weapon | UtilityWeapon | Shield | QuantumDrive | PowerPlant | Cooler | Radar | Countermeasure | EMP | QuantumInterdictionGenerator | MiningLaser | MiningArm | MiningModifier | TractorBeam | SalvageHead | RepairBeam | MissileRack | TorpedoRack | BombRack | RocketPod | Missile | WeaponMissile | Torpedo | Bomb | Rocket | Turret | TurretBase | TurretUnmanned | JumpModule | JumpDrive | Paint | Livery

game_component_category.description: Game-facing component classification used by the UI and loadout tools.

is_bespoke.description: True when the component appears to be ship-specific rather than universally swappable.

min_purchase_price.description: Lowest extracted in-game purchase price from linked shop inventories.

min_rental_price_1d.description: Lowest extracted 1-day rental price from linked shop inventories.

purchase_location_count.description: Number of extracted shop locations selling this component.

rental_location_count.description: Number of extracted shop locations renting this component.

min_purchase_price.description: Lowest extracted in-game purchase price from linked shop inventories.

min_rental_price_1d.description: Lowest extracted 1-day rental price from linked shop inventories.

purchase_location_count.description: Number of extracted shop locations selling this item.

rental_location_count.description: Number of extracted shop locations renting this item.

min_purchase_price.description: Lowest extracted in-game purchase price from linked shop inventories.

purchase_location_count.description: Number of extracted shop locations selling this paint.

rental_location_count.description: Number of extracted shop locations renting this paint.

location_uuid.description: Linked game.locations UUID when the shop can be attached to a physical or canonical location.

loc_key.description: Canonical location key used as a fallback attachment when location_uuid is unavailable.

content.description: Full article text (only on detail endpoint)
Full article text (only on detail endpoint)

children.description: Celestial bodies (planets, moons, stations, jump points)

availableForTactics.description: Whether the ship owner made this corporation ship available to tactical boards.

itemName.description: Human-readable item name resolved from extracted game data when available.

source.description: Optional fleet item source, e.g. rsi_hangar for browser-extension synchronized entries.

sourceExternalId.description: Stable external id from the source system.

sourceLabel.description: Human-readable label captured from the source.

Faction.description: Merged faction view: mission aggregate stats (from extracted missions) combined with game registry fields when the faction name matches a GameFaction record.

name.description: Faction name as it appears in mission data

game_faction_uuid.description: UUID from the game faction registry (null when no registry match)

default_reaction.description: Default reaction to the player (e.g. Neutral, Hostile)

allies.description: Array of allied faction class names

enemies.description: Array of enemy faction class names

GameFaction.description: Game faction record from the DataForge registry (game.factions table). Use /factions/registry for a paginated list.

default_reaction.description: Default player reaction (e.g. Neutral, Hostile, Friendly)

allies.description: JSON array of allied faction class names

enemies.description: JSON array of enemy faction class names

ReputationStanding.description: Reputation standing tier (e.g. Hostile, Neutral, Friendly, Ally) with thresholds and drift settings.

min_reputation.description: Minimum reputation score required to reach this standing

drift_time_hours.description: Hours before reputation drifts toward neutral

gated.description: Whether this standing gates access to certain content

ReputationScope.description: Reputation scope — a faction-specific reputation track with its own ceiling and standings list.

initial_reputation.description: Starting reputation value for new players

reputation_ceiling.description: Maximum achievable reputation in this scope

standings.description: JSON array of standing references for this scope

motivation.example: I am building a Discord bot that needs authenticated Starvis ship and economy data.

source.description: Normalized media source: Pledge Store carousel, RSI media CDN, or Ship Matrix fallback.

jti.description: Token identifier. The token secret is never returned after creation.

token.description: Short-lived token scoped to RSI hangar sync.

externalId.description: Stable RSI hangar item id or extension-generated id.

className.description: Known Star Citizen ship class name when the extension can read it.

ServiceUnavailable.description: Game data not yet available (extractor hasn't run)

get.description: Returns space ships only (`vehicle_category = ship`). Use `/ground-vehicles` or `/gravlev` for other vehicle types.

parameters.description: Comma-separated relations: manufacturer, paints, similar, matrix

parameters.name: include
parameters.description: Comma-separated relations: manufacturer, paints, similar, matrix. Similar ships have same career/role; matrix includes RSI specs.

password.description: Must contain uppercase, lowercase, digit and special character

requiresVerification.description: Always true — user must verify their email before logging in

get.summary: Admin statistics (ship matrix + game data counts)

get.description: Returns the latest in-memory request log entries since the last API restart. Request bodies and query values are not stored.

parameters.name: scope
parameters.description: Filter logs by audience: external API only, Starvis web UI only, or all request logs.

password.description: Must be 8+ chars with uppercase, lowercase, digit and special character
Must contain uppercase, lowercase, digit and special character

200.description: Paginated bug report list with user info
Paginated list of the authenticated user's reports

201.description: Report created — confirmation email sent to user and notification to admin

post.description: Validates the email verification token sent after registration. Returns a JWT on success — the user is now logged in.

token.description: Token received in the verification email

post.description: Always returns success to prevent email enumeration. If the account exists a reset link is emailed.

200.description: Success (regardless of whether the email exists)

post.description: Validates the reset token (valid 1 hour) and sets a new password.

password.description: Must contain uppercase, lowercase, digit and special character

post.description: Generates a TOTP secret and returns the QR code URL. Call `/auth/2fa/enable` with a valid code to activate.

qrCodeUrl.description: otpauth:// URL to encode as QR code

400.description: Invalid TOTP code or 2FA not set up
Invalid TOTP code or 2FA not enabled

post.description: Called after a login that returned `requires2FA: true`. Supply the pending token and the TOTP code to receive a full JWT.

pendingToken.description: Short-lived token returned by POST /auth/login when 2FA is required

400.description: Invalid TOTP code or session expired

get.description: Returns the CTM URL and proxy URL for the ship's 3D model. Use `/model/file` to download the binary.

404.description: Ship not found or no 3D model available

get.description: Serves the binary `.ctm` file. First request downloads from RSI and caches to disk; subsequent requests are served from cache. Supports `If-None-Match` / ETag for browser caching.

get.summary: Get the current user external API access request

409.description: Request already pending or access already enabled

get.summary: Get one enriched object by type and identifier
get.description: Returns a normalized detail payload for a ship, component, item, commodity, shop or location, with useful related data in one response. Use `include=none` to disable default relations or pass a comma-separated include list.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Object family to resolve. Common plural aliases are accepted by the API.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Object UUID, class name or numeric shop id depending on the object type.

parameters.name: include
parameters.description: Comma-separated relations to include. Defaults: ship=manufacturer,loadout,paints,modules,hardpoints,variants,similar,buy_locations,gallery; component=buy_locations,ships; item=manufacturer,buy_locations; commodity=prices; shop=inventory,prices; location=children. Use `none` for only the object.

get.summary: List API tokens generated by the current developer account

parameters.name: includeRevoked
parameters.description: Include revoked tokens in the supervision list.

delete.summary: Revoke one of the current developer account API tokens

get.summary: List all generated API tokens with owner metadata

post.summary: Create a short-lived RSI hangar sync token
Mirror RSI hangar entries into the current user fleet
post.description: Called by the Starvis browser extension. The token is created by /corp/fleet/rsi-sync/session and expires quickly. Only entries with source rsi_hangar are upserted or removed; manual fleet declarations are preserved.
